kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

test.name: As a user, I want to user register to future skill platform

kw.name: When future skill should display page and display message as "คอร์สออนไลน์"
kw.source_name: future skill should display page and display message as "${expected_message}"

kw.name: Wait until page contains element then verify text
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'คอร์สออนไลน์'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Then user register to future skill platform with ${email} and ${firstName} and ${lastName} and ${phoneNumber} and ${newPassword} and ${confirmPassword}
kw.source_name: user register to future skill platform with ${email} and ${firstName} and ${lastName} and ${phoneNumber} and ${newPassword} and ${confirmPassword}

kw.name: Wait until element is ready then click element
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[text()="สมัครสมาชิก"]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.arg: xpath=//button[text()="สมัครสมาชิก"]

kw.name: Wait until element is ready then input text
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait until element is ready then input text
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait until element is ready then input text
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait until element is ready then input text
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait until element is ready then input text
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait until element is ready then input text
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait until element is ready then click element
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait until element is ready then click element
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[text()="สมัครสมาชิก"]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.arg: xpath=//button[text()="สมัครสมาชิก"]

kw.name: future skill should display page and display message as "OTP"
kw.source_name: future skill should display page and display message as "${expected_message}"

kw.name: Wait until page contains element then verify text
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
